# Feature Runtime Matrix

**Date:** 2026-07-24  
**Branch:** claude/boss-renaissance-v3  
**Certification Level:** RC1 — Pre-release audit  
**Generated by:** Platform Reliability Framework (PRF)

---

## Definition

| Status | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| ✅ PASS | Feature loads, authenticates, fetches data, renders correctly |
| ❌ FAIL | Feature fails at one or more stages in the runtime lifecycle |
| ⚠️ PARTIAL | Feature loads but with degraded data or missing dependencies |
| 🔲 NOT BUILT | Feature exists in nav/spec but implementation not started |
| 🚧 KNOWN ISSUE | Failure is documented and tracked; not a regression |

---

---

## Error State Standard (PRF Contract)

Every feature **must** display:

```
[Feature Name] temporarily unavailable

[Human-readable explanation — no technical jargon]

Status:        API Request Failed
Error Code:    FEATURE_FETCH_FAILED
HTTP:          503
Dependency:    [Named service that failed]
Correlation ID [UUID — selectable text]

[Retry]   [View Details]
```

Features showing only a spinner or a generic "Something went wrong" message **fail the PRF contract** regardless of API status.

---

## Blocked by Operations

The following features fail at the **API** stage due to missing infrastructure, not code bugs:

| Feature | Blocker |
|---------|---------|
| Business MRI (full) | Requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in Render env |
| Business DNA (full) | Requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in Render env |
| Workflow Sessions | Migration 0049 not applied to Supabase |
| Auth JWT custom claims | Migration 0047 hook not registered in Supabase |

These are operator actions, not code changes. Once applied, the features should move to PASS.

---

## Release Gate

**RC1 deployment is blocked until:**
- [ ] All PASS features remain PASS on a fresh deploy
- [ ] All PARTIAL features have a filed issue with a target release
- [ ] All operational blockers above are resolved
- [ ] Runtime dashboard at `/admin/runtime/features` shows ≥ 75% PASS

This matrix is regenerated as part of the release process. An automated check comparing this file to live runtime results should be added in RC2.
